title: Building on prediction markets is more painful than it should be, so I built a unified API to fix it
author: ButterscotchNo3385
selftext:
If you’ve integrated platforms like polymarket or kalshi, you know how much time goes into handling different APIs, schemas, and edge cases instead of building features.

So, I built **TESS Radar** to fix this, a unified API for prediction markets with consistent access to markets, trades, orderbooks, stats, and optional deep AI-powered research :)

live - [Research Dashboard | Tess Radar](https://www.tessradar.com/)

comments.author: ButterscotchNo3385
